programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: The Ninth Gate
programme.desc: A rare book dealer, while seeking out the last two copies of a demon text, gets drawn into a conspiracy with supernatural overtones. Starring: Johnny Depp, Frank Langella, Lena Olin

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: What Happens In Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly get married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: Fanboys
programme.desc: A group of Star Wars fans travel to Skywalker Ranch to steal a copy of 'The Phantom Menace,' so that their terminally ill friend can see it before its release in theaters several months down the line.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Blotto
programme.desc: Stan must lie to his wife to go out with Ollie.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Sons Of The Desert
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie's wives find out they've been tricked into believing they're on a medical cruise.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Block Heads
programme.desc: Unaware that the Great War has ended, Stan remains faithfully at his post for twenty years

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Hog Wild
programme.desc: Hog Wild is a 1930 American pre-Code Laurel and Hardy film, directed by James Parrott.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Busy Bodies
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie battle inanimate objects, coworkers, and the laws of physics in a sawmill.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Another Fine Mess
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie hide in a mansion to escape from a policeman.

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: A silver mine with a secret entrance along the Mexican border is the setting for this typical Roy Rogers western with music.

programme.title: Circus World
programme.desc: When circus proprietor Matt Masters decides to take his show on a European tour, it is beset by problems, while he searches for Lili, the mother of his adopted daughter, who disappeared years before. Starring: John Wayne, Rita Hayworth, Claudia Cardinale

programme.title: Young Guns
programme.desc: In a lawless and violent time, six young outcasts are hired by an English merchant as 'regulators' to guard his ranch against the mob, a corrupt and powerful ring.

programme.title: Banana Joe: Banana Joe
programme.desc: A man is living happily on an island with his family, growing bananas. When a local mobster with an eye on man's property tries to take it from him, he must go to the town for the first time to get some help.

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: In a quest to find a lost colleague, a team of scientists find themselves deep underground in an ancient labyrinth, while trying to unearth a secret that has been buried for centuries.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: Notorious assassin Elektra unwittingly takes part in her former teacher's test when she protects a former target and his daughter from "The Hand," a sinister crime syndicate of martial arts fighters.

programme.title: Escape Plan: Escape Plan
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone, Arnold Schwarzenegger, and 50 Cent star as inmates who must break out of a top secret, high-security prison in this non-stop action-thriller.

programme.title: We Have Your Husband
programme.desc: When her husband is kidnapped, Jayne is pushed to the limit to raise the ransom money that will guarantee his safe return. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Strange But True
programme.desc: Five years after the tragic death of her boyfriend, a woman arrives on the doorstep of his family claiming she is pregnant with his child.

programme.title: Seduced By A Thief
programme.desc: When a security guard is blamed for the theft of a necklace, he tracks down the beautiful thief, only to be seduced into a world of diamond smuggling and double-cross.

programme.title: Kill The Irishman
programme.desc: Oscar®-winner Christopher Walken, Val Kilmer, and Ray Stevenson star in KILL THE IRISHMAN, the true story of a tough Irish thug working for mobsters in Cleveland during the 1970s.

programme.title: Space Raiders
programme.desc: A futuristic, sensitive tale of adventure and confrontation when a 10 year old boy is accidentally kidnapped by a spaceship filled with a motley crew of space pirates.

programme.title: Fantastic Planet
programme.desc: On a faraway planet where blue giants rule, oppressed humanoids rebel against their machine-like leaders.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Kids From Planet 62F
programme.desc: Four friends find an object with special powers that belongs to two alien kids from the planet 62F. Now they must race to get it back to its rightful owners, but NASA are on their tail and they will stop at nothing to get their hands on it.

programme.title: The Adventures of Pinocchio
programme.desc: One of puppet-maker Geppetto's creations, a puppet called Pinocchio, magically comes to life. In order to become a real boy, Pinocchio must go on a daring adventure and learn valuable lessons.

programme.title: My Brother the Pig
programme.desc: Being a teen is tough enough for Kathy Cauldwell without having to be the target of her little brother George's jokes. Then their parents leave for France and George is magically transformed into a pig via some of their nanny Matilda's ancient rocks.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Passage At Arms
programme.desc: A woman is found dead, but was it suicide or murder? A French fencing match provides the telling clue.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Sorcerer
programme.desc: A psychologist is stabbed to death in a seemingly sealed room. Inspector March must find who killed him and how did they accomplish the task.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Present Tense
programme.desc: Colonel March's niece, a believer in spiritualism, hears her dead husband's voice and becomes convinced he has returned as a ghost; but has he?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: At Night All Cats Are Gray
programme.desc: A lady claims an odd man is following her and fears for her life. She’s later found murdered...in mismatched color, a telling clue for the inspector.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Kidnapped Poodle
programme.desc: Colonel March investigates a valuable stolen diamond as well as the kidnapping of a little boy's poodle; he thinks both incidents may be connected.

programme.title: I Bury The Living
programme.desc: Cemetery director Robert Kraft discovers that by arbitrarily changing the status of plots from empty to occupied on the planogram causes the death of the plots' owners.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: With the help of D B Russell, Mac is able to identify who kidnapped Christine.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team unravels three twisted tales of love in a trio of separate murder cases.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A riot threatens to break out at a Manhattan precinct.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Adam witnesses a murder online while participating in a webchat with a stranger.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A decomposed body is found on a rooftop.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A sniper begins a campaign of random shootings in the city.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the murder of a man during his ex-wife's divorce party.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a flight attendant is murdered, a pilot, a marshal and stalker are all in the frame.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a finalist in a reality show in murdered, the team look at the other contestants.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: As Delko hovers between life and death, he experiences a flashback to 1997.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man storms the crime lab and takes new recruit Jesse Cardoza hostage.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs search for an inventive murderer.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom is fascinated when every detail of a miniature is identical to that of a real crime scene, and he goes about trying to solve the case using the clues provided.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When an innocent man is brutally attacked and beaten to death by what looks like a monster in a black cape, the CSIs are called to investigate, only to learn that a similar attack took place minutes later.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a dead woman is found hanging from a cross inside a church, the team follows the evidence to uncover a bizarre love triangle dating all the way back to the victim's high school days.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When two young boys are reported missing, a known neighborhood sex offender is the primary suspect.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While investigating an elderly woman's murder, Grissom receives a miniature crime scene replica; Greg attends a hearing to ascertain his culpability in a teenager's accidental death.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When identical twins are found dead, the evidence in both cases does not immediately prove a connection between the two deaths. However, as the CSIs dig deeper into the histories of the women, a surprising twist takes the investigation in a new direction.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crossroads
programme.desc: To protect a key witness who is en route to testifying against a deadly drug cartel, Team Scorpion takes her on the run, with the cartel hot on their heels.

programme.title: Scorpion: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Walter finally learns Cabe's long-kept secret regarding the Baghdad mission, and it threatens to tear Team Scorpion apart forever.

programme.title: Scorpion: Postcards From the Edge
programme.desc: Scorpion, torn apart and uncertain about their future as a team, must come together for their most important mission yet to save Walter's life as his car teeters on the side of a cliff.

programme.title: Scorpion: Satellite Of Love
programme.desc: The new Director of Homeland Security reunites the team when a nuclear powered Russian satellite is knocked out of orbit and must be diverted before it detonates over Southern California.

programme.title: Scorpion: Cuba Libre
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Cuba when a woman from Cabe's past pleads for him to help catch a Serbian war criminal.

programme.title: Scorpion: Fish Filet
programme.desc: In order to save the lives of three judges, Sylvester goes undercover in federal prison but Team Scorpion must break him out when his life is threatened. Kevin Weisman guest stars.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Class Dismissed
programme.desc: As local high schools wind to a close for summer, dangerous pranks abound – including the theft of an armed police car. While tracking down the stolen vehicle, Andy and Swarek pick up the trail of a volatile teen boy

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Good Shoot
programme.desc: Dov Epstein happens upon a convenience store robbery-in-progress that results in him shooting a young black teenager.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Girl’s Night Out
programme.desc: On Traciʼs first day as a detective, all hell breaks loose when a carload of girls from a bachelorette party hits another vehicle, killing the driver. Jerry discovers that the driver of the parked car was dead before the accident.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Messy Houses
programme.desc: While answering a domestic disturbance call, Andyʼs personal life is turned inside out when the social worker on the scene turns out to be her estranged mother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Coming Home
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe -- a homeless squatter whoʼs been stabbed in the warehouse

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: When a gifted psychic - or, at the very least, a gifted conman - enters 15 Division to help find the missing witness in an organized-crime case, the officers are forced to come face-to-face with some of the hidden truths

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides (Kyle MacLachlan) leads the fight for vital spice on a desert planet in the year 10191.

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: In the 28th century, two special operatives (Dane DeHaan, Cara Delevingne) race against time to save the diverse city of Alpha from a dark force that also jeopardizes the future of the universe.

programme.title: Looper
programme.desc: A mob hit man (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) comes to the chilling realization that his latest assignment is his older self (Bruce Willis), sent back in time by his bosses.

programme.title: The Constant Husband
programme.desc: An Englishman wakes in a hotel bedroom suffering from amnesia and sets out to find his identity. He tracks down his wife but soon learns that the job she saw him leave for every morning did not exist.

programme.title: The Rainbow Jacket
programme.desc: A prize-winning jockey is banned from racing so he spends his time helping a young lad to become the next champion.

programme.title: The Family Way
programme.desc: Young newlyweds Arthur and Jenny have to spend their first night together at the home of Arthur's parents. The couple are prevented from having any intimacy, but it only gets worse.

programme.title: Passionate Summer
programme.desc: While coping with two lovers, a teacher at a Jamaican boarding school tries to help a troubled student.

programme.title: Medium: Lady Killer
programme.desc: As Allison teams up with Scanlon to track down the dangerous cougar they believe is responsible for the murders of young men, she also has visions that Devalos' campaign is in jeopardy.

programme.title: Medium: Partners In Crime
programme.desc: When Joe presents his new solar power-based invention to an investment firm, he piques the interest of venture capitalist Meghan Doyle.

programme.title: Medium: A Cure For What Ails You
programme.desc: Allison has visions of a friend of Scanlon and Lynn DiNovi dying in a home mishap.

programme.title: Medium: Car Trouble
programme.desc: Allison meets Meghan Doyle, Joe's new business partner. Meanwhile, her old car stops working and Joe surprises her with a nice looking used car.

programme.title: Medium: Being Joey Carmichael
programme.desc: Allison has dreams that help Scanlon in his search to find out who killed a wealthy local drug dealer.

programme.title: Medium: Drowned World
programme.desc: In the fourth season finale, Allison tries to help a young couple who thinks their house is haunted, but her efforts result in murder.

programme.title: JAG: Hemlock
programme.desc: By mistake a foreign agent sends a fax to Meg's office; then he retrieves it and shoots Meg to prevent her from identifying him

programme.title: JAG: High Ground
programme.desc: A Marine sniper receives orders contrary to a previous deal; his CO refuses to listen; the sniper takes a shot at the CO's Humvee.

programme.title: JAG: Smoked
programme.desc: After a lightning strike, an F-14 wanders into Cuban airspace, and Cuban fighters force it to land

programme.title: JAG: Black Ops
programme.desc: A Naval aviator, while temporarily assigned to a SEAL team, drowns at sea; he was the son of a woman senator.

programme.title: JAG: Survivors
programme.desc: In a civilian court Harm represents a divorced (and emotionally baffled) Marine colonel, who has gotten into trouble over an unauthorized visit with his minor son.

programme.title: JAG: Recovery
programme.desc: A Navy astronaut dies during a drill while preparing for a space mission to repair a satellite

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A vigilante, out for blood, goes too far when he takes the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A shooter inside a historic arena leaves Sam questioning his place on the team.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU team attempts to rescue a carjacked baby and a young man held hostage.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A woman kidnaps two young girls while the SRU's question how the kidnappings are related.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Two brothers get caught up in a white supremacy group that is planning a terrorist attack.

programme.title: Let Go
programme.desc: Featuring the king of comedy Kevin Hart, this hilarious, unconventional and heartfelt journey is all about love, loss and other felonies! Discontent parole officer Walter is struggling with the humdrums of married life.

programme.title: Life of a king
programme.desc: The film tells the true story of Eugene Brown, an ex-convict who starts the Big Chair Chess Club.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: In this tense action-thriller starring Ray Winstone and Temuera Morrison, Arjan, an ex-soldier, is hired to hunt down a fugitive. But what starts out as easy bounty soon turns into a dangerous game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Lugosi was much more than Count Dracula, as youll see in this fascinating salute to this complex Hungarian actor.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Perhaps horrors greatest star, Karloff, of course, played the Frankenstein monster. Heres an affectionate look at this cultured Englishman.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Nothing like a good ghost story  except a centurys worth of films filled with more ghost stories!

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Lon Chaney Sr. was the original Phantom of the Opera, but there have been other notable portrayals  and other notable phantoms!

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: More than just the Devil, demons have been a mainstay of horror films since the silent days.

programme.title: Castle of the Living Dead
programme.desc: A troupe of travelling players are invited by Count Drago to perform at his castle. Ignoring the warning given by a local mystic, they accept - and begin to die, horrifically, one by one!

programme.title: Invitation to Hell
programme.desc: Horror master Wes Craven directs this story about a family that moves to a suburban town only to be coerced into joining a suspicious club. Starring: Robert Urich, Joanna Cassidy, Susan Lucci

programme.title: Transylvania 6-5000
programme.desc: Two tabloid reporters (Jeff Goldblum, Ed Begley Jr.) go to a strange land to check on rumors of monsters running amok.

programme.title: Return of the Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite muck-encrusted plant-man is back in this tongue-in-cheek action-adventure which was the sequel to the original cult classic Swamp Thing and based on the award-winning D.C. Comics series. Starring: Heather Locklear, Louis Jourdan

programme.title: The Bat
programme.desc: A crazed killer known as "The Bat" is on the loose in a mansion full of people.

programme.title: Planet of the Sharks
programme.desc: In the near future, glacial melting has covered 98% of earth's landmass. Sharks have flourished and now dominate the planet, operating as one massive school led by a mutated alpha shark.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt goes after an outlaw who shot Chester.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Kitty's father arrives in Dodge to try and take her back to New Orleans.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A retired Army officer asks Matt to appoint him deputy.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A gunman tries to start a fight with a braggart.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A hot-tempered man thinks Matt is pursuing his wife.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt must find out who sent a supposed professional killer to Dodge and why.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: The man who threatened to kill Chester arrives in town.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: The friendship between Harry Spener and Joe Harpe is jeopardized by the fact that there's a price on the latter's head.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: The Banzai Pipeline, one of the world's most exciting and dangerous surfing beaches, forms the backdrop for a trio of slayings. McGarrett is thwarted when the man is found murdered near the Pipeline.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett calls on attractive HPD policewomen, senior officers and scientific technology when the Five-O force is confronted by a series of five rape murders.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Anthony Zerbe guest stars as a right-wing extremist who embarks on a murderous crusade against what he considers laxity in law enforcement and too-lenient judges. After the case against hit-man Joseph Furika is dismissed, he is murdered.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Impressionist John Byner makes his dramatic debut as a shipboard comedian beset by gambling debts. McGarrett and Five-O become involved while investigating the robbery-kidnapping of Vincent Gordon on board a cruise ship.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A well-to-do, stylish, Raffles-type jewel thief steals from Waikiki hotel rooms for the thrill of the chase. As his calling card, he leaves a series of clues that add up to an elegant method of operation.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: A retired silent film comedian, Pinky, donates his films to the Phoenix Foundation and together, he and MacGyver, find themselves caught in a deadly trap woven by a special effects master named Neil who is out for revenge.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver helps his good friend Dent train for a boxing match and finds that he must rescue Dent's daughter from gamblers who have kidnapped her.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: While working at the Challenger Club, MacGyver finds he must save the local gang kids from Minton, the local gun supplier, who is planning to kill all the gang members as well as letting Brian Jefferies take the wrap for a murder he did not commit.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver fights to save a housing project after tenants have been forced out of their homes by corrupt money-hungry landlords.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and his old friend Jack Dalton discover that inhabitants in a mountain valley live to be over 150 years old. Unfortunately, they also discover that it is the secret site of a heavy water plant used for nuclear weapon technology.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When MacGyver becomes intertwined in a scheme to stop Chinese slave labor, he discovers that he has a son, Sam, who is also interested in bringing the fall of the man behind it all.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A beautiful woman who believes her husband has wronged her swears vengeance against all men.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A vicious old mountain, woman's back-country family hold Rowdy Yates for ransom when he tries to buy horses from them.

programme.desc: When Lindsey accompanies Suzanne to work and meets an old friend of her mother's, a misunderstanding causes Lindsey to believe she may have an older brother.

programme.desc: When Suzanne catches Nick spying a racy rap video featuring a pole dancer, she sets out to show him her own pole-dancing prowess.

programme.desc: Heavy rains and snow runoff carry manure into Milwaukee's water supply, making 400,000 people ill.

programme.title: Medical Detectives

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators used obscure evidence to find the person responsible for killing justice officials with mail bombs.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police find similar circumstances when a couple whose daughter disappeared report their second daughter missing.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic scientists provide authorities with evidence that a death deemed accidental 20 years ago was actually murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: How a biochemistry and molecular biology professor's evidence exonerated a woman convicted of murdering her infant.

programme.title: Medical Detectives

programme.title: Psych

programme.title: Psych

programme.title: Psych

programme.title: Psych

programme.title: Psych

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hearts of Stone

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: The New Detectives: Predators And Parasites

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.desc: Both teams replicate six Hell's Kitchen entrees while kicking chefs out of the kitchen until only one remains. Chef Ramsay holds a `Cook For Your Life' challenge. Robyn, Giovanni, Milly, Barbie, Manda, and Elise must recreate his signature dish.

programme.desc: A report on the hunt for a serial killer suspected of murdering three young women from Los Angeles, California to Chicago, Illinois.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Killer Next Door

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Secret Life of Eric Wright

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Carriers
programme.desc: Enemy agent Janos Passik is preparing to train 200 foreign agents to infiltrate the U.S. and engage in some form of bacteriological warfare.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Short Tail Spy

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork In Wonderland Part 1 & 2
programme.desc: After taking cold medicine, Mork begins to shrink & Mork winds up in a parallel universe where Exidor has become a tyrannical king.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork's Baby Blues
programme.desc: Kathy drags Mork home for an evening and later announces that she's pregnant with his child.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: The Night They Raided Mind-Ski's
programme.desc: Mork haplessly gets involved with a group of white supremacists.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Hold That Mork
programme.desc: Nelson tries to further his political career by getting Mork the opportunity to try out to be a Denver Broncos cheerleader.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Jeanie Loves Mork
programme.desc: Mindy takes a job writing the Miss Lonely Hearts newspaper column and unknowingly encourages Jean to pursue a romantic relationship with Mork.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: The Way Mork Were
programme.desc: Fred confesses that he's having marital difficulties, so Mork and Mindy relay stories of their troubled times.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Putting the Ork Back In Mork (Part 2)
programme.desc: It could be Mork's last night on Earth when an ancient Orkan elder who looks like a ten-year-old boy arrives with the news that Mork must return to Ork for forecycling because he has picked up too many Earthly ways.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork In Never-Never Land
programme.desc: With Mindy depressed about not getting a scholarship, it's up to Mork to stir up some laughs, so he brings home a friend who claims to be the real Peter Pan, with the power to fly as just one of his magical talents.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Dueling Skates
programme.desc: It's the biggest, funniest roller marathon ever when Mork takes to skates for the first time to race a cheating champion skater down a Rocky Mountain peak into Boulder to save the day care center at which he works from destruction.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork, The Monkey's Uncle
programme.desc: Mork turns the apartment he shares with Mindy into a hilarious hideaway for a young chimpanzee that he kidnaps from the Boulder zoo in the mistaken belief that the animal's mother has been abducted.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: King Solomon ruled Israel 3,000 years ago, famed for a visit from the Queen of Sheba. The quest for Solomon's gold spans millennia. Karl Mauch believed he found Ophir in southern Africa. Yet, the search for Solomon's true mines persists.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1941, Germany looted the Amber Room, an extraordinary art installation from the Soviet Union, deemed the eighth wonder of the world. Taken to Konigsberg, it vanished by war's end, sparking a decades-long hunt.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The Honjo Masamune, Japan's greatest sword, vanished after WWII. Taken as a souvenir by a US Sergeant, it's now a legendary lost artifact sought by collectors worldwide.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1935, Otto Rahn, a German writer, was tasked by Heinrich Himmler to find the Holy Grail. Himmler, despite his Nazi beliefs, envisioned displaying it in his castle, Wewelsberg, as his Camelot.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The Book of Thoth, a legendary text of magic and wisdom, has inspired Freemasons, Tarot readers, and occultists across centuries. Yet, archaeologists doubt its existence despite its influence on esoteric culture from ancient Egypt to modern times.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Natural History Museum, London
programme.desc: From Darwin’s original specimens to a lost workshop that inspired James Bond, discover the secrets of Britain’s Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Vatican
programme.desc: From Michelangelo’s Sistine Chapel frescoes to the fall of the Knights Templar, discover the secrets inside the Vatican Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Midwest Stormfest
programme.desc: This season the tornadoes begin early - in February. Through the season, George follows the big weather from Missouri west to the Dakotas, and dodges the huge, destructive Greensburg tornado in southern Kansas.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Boiling Lake
programme.desc: Tucked away, high in the mountains of the Caribbean island of Dominica lies a marvel of nature  a lake whose water literally boils and steams like a witch's cauldron.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Island Caving
programme.desc: Accompanied by a group of hardcore cavers from Alberta and British Columbia, George descends into spectacular caves that lead deep into the earth on Vancouver Island. The team carries inflatable kayaks to explore a dark underground river.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Fire And Water
programme.desc: It's the intense summer wildfires that often plague the area during their 24 hours of daylight. He travels by train, bike, plane and whitewater raft to reach the fires but Mother Nature has other plans for him and doesn't make things easy.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Elephant Cave
programme.desc: Waterfall-shrouded Kitum Cave has been carved out by elephants in search of salt on Mount Elgon at the Kenya-Uganda border. George gets bitten by one of the cave bats suspected of carrying the deadly Marburg virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Venezuela Lightning
programme.desc: Gas from Catatumbo swamps mixed with cold air from the Andes create a perpetual lightning storm on South America's largest lake. From here George canoes 84 km to world's highest waterfall, swims with piranhas and holds a huge Anaconda.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Under Pressure
programme.desc: After submarine exploration of Grand Cayman Island, George dives with Canadian Armed Forces' experimental deep pressure unit. With explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuytten he investigates newly discovered "Black Smoker" deep sea vents.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Eco-Disasters
programme.desc: Uzbekistan's Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, shrunk to 1/6 its previous size; a Crimea mountain carved into a submarine base; Chernobyl nuclear site reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane
programme.desc: Linking up with legendary storm chaser Jim Leonard, George flies to Jamaica to track Hurricane Dean. George then travels to Nova Scotia to experience the even bigger turmoil of Hurricane Noel at the iconic Maritime village of Peggy's Cove.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of 'dad dancing'; Liz tracks her family tree through the use of DNA; Jem builds a singing road.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: To the Moon - The Apollo program achieves its major objective. Dragon, Falcon and Spacex - New directions in re-usable spacecraft. Gaia- Mapping our galaxy in unprecedented detail.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Space Shuttle Matures - The Space Transportation System changes the nature of orbital missions. Complex Construction in Space - Confidence in the shuttle begins to return and engineers for get the lessons of the past.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini: Docking and EVA - In the final phase of the Gemini program NASA struggles with docking and spacewalks. Curiosity Roving Mars - On the surface of Mars the Curiosity rover is changing the way we think about the red planet.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Advances - America's first manned space program finally puts a man in orbit. Camera Tracking - The array of special cameras that follow a spacecraft at launch. The International Space Station - The building and operation.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Apollo Program Begins - At the very beginning of NASA's moon project things go wrong. Caves - ESA's special training program for astronauts. Planck - Mapping the cosmic microwave background radiation.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Beyond Earth Orbit - The Apollo program takes bold new steps. IXV Re-entry Vehicle - Europe is working to perfect a re-entry vehicle. Galileo Satellites Lost and Found - Navigation satellites go into incorrect orbit.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Begins - The start of NASA & America's first manned space program. Mars Express - The European Space Agency's Mars Satellite. The Soyuz Launch System - The gradual evolution of Russia's Soyuz launcher.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Commences - Did Gemini give the US a lead in the space race? Venus Express - The last days of ESA's Venus probe. EMU - NASA's Extravehicular Mobility Unit. Deep Space Communications - ESA's worldwide network of giant dishes.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Shuttle Program - The first re-useable spacecraft. The Challenger Disaster - Pressing launch schedules lead to carelessness and the loss of the Challenger. Return to Space - A re-designed shuttle is back in space with a redefined role.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Rebuilding Project Apollo - After the Apollo 1 disaster NASA resumes manned space flight. Orbiting Carbon Observatory 2 - Monitoring the Earth's Co2 levels in unprecedented detail. Zero Gravity Training - Parabolic flights.

programme.title: Expedition Wallacea
programme.desc: Young naturalist Alfred Wallace was mystified: why were the flora and fauna of Bali and Lombok so radically different?

programme.title: Gold Rush Ghost Ships
programme.desc: John Pollack and his team from the ‘Institute of Nautical Archaeology’ investigate this only remaining ship of the gold rush which was found underwater to date.

programme.title: Great Moments in Evolution: The Miracle of Life
programme.desc: It all began with a single cell. In the course of almost four billion years, this one cell evolved into the diversity of life that exists on the planet today.

programme.title: Great Moments in Evolution: Secrets of Survival
programme.desc: There were five great waves of mass extinction in the history of life. The biggest disaster struck around 250 million years ago.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: Heroes and Misfits
programme.desc: After WW1, misfits and heroes combine to become the Nazis.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Rainforest
programme.desc: Daintree National Park is a magical meeting of rainforest and reef, lying at the heart of the world heritage listed wet tropics of Queensland.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Vietnam - Phoenix from the Ashes
programme.desc: Vietnam is the easternmost country on the Indochina peninsula in Southeast Asia. Around ten percent of the world’s species live here. But less than 50 years ago, things were very different. Vietnam’s forests were decimated.

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia
programme.desc: Cloaked in tropical rainforest and warmed by clear blue seas Indonesia is a paradise. Although much of the island chain receives sporadic rain throughout the year, this alone wouldn’t be enough to sustain the region’s rich abundance of life.

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia
programme.desc: Indonesia’s enduring heat provides energy for it’s reptilian residents to thrive, and so much so, they outnumber it’s mammalian inhabitants.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators: Mantis: The Queen of the Waterless River
programme.desc: This is the story of a Praying mantis which was born in the dry grasslands of Southern Italy.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 31
programme.desc: Tonight, teams must demonstrate what they’ve learned so far by recreating their instant restaurant in a suburban street, cooking from a kitchen in a shipping container.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 32
programme.desc: The two weakest teams from the Instant Restaurant Street Party Challenge face off in Sudden Death at Kitchen HQ. Two teams both cooking their hearts out in an elimination that will shatter dreams.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 33
programme.desc: Tonight’s tests include the ultimate plating challenge; a teammate test using set ingredients; and a test to produce the ultimate luxury fine dining meal.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 34
programme.desc: It’s Ultimate Instant Restaurant time with the biggest dinner parties ever seen on MKR! Eight teams return to their own homes to cook for 16 guests.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 35
programme.desc: Record holders, Amy & Tyson, are concocting one of the most obscure menus imaginable! But when you’re playing to a critical crowd, will these risky moves be their ultimate downfall?

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Master metal man Ian Roussel attempts to complete his wild show car

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: An inside look at Full Custom Garage.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian takes on a new challenge for a high-end car show.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian goes on the hunt for his biggest build yet.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian kicks off the build with some crazy concepts.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian kicks off the build with some crazy concepts.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian jumps into building the back of the car.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian works with a wild idea for the rear design.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian builds with a variety of parts to design the front end.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian tries to turn a crazy concept into reality and complete the front end.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Up on the Roof
programme.desc: Today, Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Family Business
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. As Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Felons Interrupted
programme.desc: Dog is confronted with two alleged felons in crisis. Family and friends of these bondees are convinced that they are getting into further trouble while awaiting trial, so Dog and the posse have to bring these men back to jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Let It Snow
programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and is facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog - the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rush from Judgment
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her bondsman, Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Burn & Return
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First, he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"- shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds. But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today, it's the threat of severe thunderstorms, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Battle of the Brothers
programme.desc: Willie's suspicious behavior from dyeing his beard to buying a new motorcycle, makes Jase come to the conclusion that Willie is having a mid-life crisis.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Aloha, Robertsons!
programme.desc: After all their hard work, Willie decides to take the entire Robertson clan on a family vacation to Hawaii. But Willie's daily itinerary for the trip gets constantly undermined by the family's desire to participate in their own island activities.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Till Duck Do Us Part
programme.desc: Everyone comes together to plan a surprise wedding for Phil and Kay, setting up a special ceremony on their land, which the whole family attends. Si distracts Phil and Kay by taking them on a "trip down memory lane".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: So You Think You Can Date?
programme.desc: After discovering that Martin has to miss a Friday night poker game for a date, the guys (as well as their wives) take turns figuring out the best way to coach him for romance. When babysitting for Jep and Jessica turns into a rocky road.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hot Tub Grime Machine
programme.desc: The guys realize that Godwin has never really asked them for a favor, even though they are all always helping each other out. Godwin asks them to help him get a hot tub, so they set out to help him pick one up.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A-Jase-ent Living
programme.desc: Due to construction at Jase and Missy's house, Willie and Korie invite Jase and the kids to live with them while Missy is out of town visiting friends. Then, what begins in the duck call room as a series of "Gentlemen's Bets".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Termite Be a Problem
programme.desc: Because of a termite problem at Duck Commander, the guys are forced to find a different location to work from - Godwin's House. But while at Godwin's house, Godwin gets a taxidermied gift from a past relative.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: John Luke After Dentist
programme.desc: John Luke and Sadie are getting some dental work done, complete with sedation, and it's up to Willie and Korie to take care of them through the process - including getting them back home safely.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Scoot Along Si
programme.desc: Si shows up to work on a mobility scooter, claiming to have an invisible injury from a fender bender with Willie. After losing her beloved turtle "Mr. T", Ms. Kay enlists Phil on a mission to find a new pet turtle.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Popcorn, Peanuts and Crackerjacks
programme.desc: A minor-league baseball team never wins, so Jonathan and Mark set out to help them. They also come to the aid of an elderly vendor who has been kicked out of the stadium.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Smile in the Third Row
programme.desc: The lead actor in a Broadway play claims that God is attending the show's performances, sitting in a third-row orchestra seat.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Secret
programme.desc: The teenage daughter of Mark's friend tries to find her biological mother. It may tear the family apart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Monster - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark connect a young blind woman with a disfigured artist.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Monster - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's friend Scotty is on hand to provide legal assistance. He defends the young artist with a facial deformity who has been accused of assaulting a blind girl.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Premonitions
programme.desc: Premonitions: A look into the predictive power of the subconscious, including a man who warns of a plane crash before it happens following a series of vivid nightmares.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Man Beasts
programme.desc: Man Beasts: We're all fascinated by mysteries. But is the unexplained really unexplainable? William Shatner investigates in an attempt to find a logical explanation.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Pentagon
programme.desc: The US government officially recognise UFOs, calling them Unidentified Aerial Phenomena. In this episode Craig and Sarah take on the US Navy UAP videos. They speak to an ex-MOD official, Nick Pope. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Ireland
programme.desc: In this episode, Craig and Sarah take a closer look at a case that took place in November 2018 off the west coast of Ireland in which pilots saw bizarre lights through their cockpit windows. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Rendlesham
programme.desc: Over the past 50 years a fascinating pattern has emerged, linking UFOs with military personnel and installations. One of the most significant of these events took place on British soil in 1980. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Operation Dragoon (August 1944)
programme.desc: The Allies break into France and push the Germans back to their own border.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Liberation of the Paris
programme.desc: Both political and military expediency were factors in the return of the French capital to its people.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Arnhem
programme.desc: The Allies launch an attack designed to push the Germans back to the Rhine River.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory
programme.desc: Gen. Douglas MacArthur's return to the Philippines, and the final push to retake the islands after two years of Japanese occupation.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Last Stronghold (November 1944)
programme.desc: American B-29 high-altitude bomber attacks Japan near the end of World War II.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Mount Belvedere
programme.desc: The Battle of the Gothic Line in 1944.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The third episode opens with Rommel’s second offensive in North Africa.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The fourth episode sees the Germans well and truly on the retreat and the Allies are able to successfully implement operation Husky: the landing on Sicily.

programme.title: Catfish UK: Neil & Jasmin
programme.desc: Neil has been chatting to Jasmin for 3 years and she's stood him up 13 times. So it's up to Julie and Oobah to find out if the person Neil has fallen for...is real? (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Rob & Sarah
programme.desc: Oobah is joined by Nathan Henry to help Rob track down his soulmate, Sarah. After two and a half years, Sarah has suddenly gone quiet and it's up to Oobah and Nathan to investigate. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Emma & Harry
programme.desc: After six months, single mum Emma and online love Harry have already set a wedding date. But the problem is, they've never met. So it's up to the Catfish UK team to track him down. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Esther & Theo
programme.desc: Esther's finally found her match in Theo. But he always refuses to video call. So it's up to Julia and Oobah to find out if Theo is who he says he is. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Cole, Abbie & The Fanpage
programme.desc: Cole and Abbie keep being sent anonymous creepy gifts to their home and their relationship is now at breaking point. Julie and Oobah head to Scotland to try and help save their marriage. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Leanne & Jamie
programme.desc: Leanne is desperate to find out if online love Jamie is her Mr Right. After cancelling on her numerous times, Leanne wants Oobah and Nella to investigate and finally bring them face to face. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: The Hills: With This Ring... / A Night At The Opera
programme.desc: Just as Heidi's apology didn't make the cut in the last episode, Spencer's hope to elope falls flat when he shares his latest bright idea with Heidi! Whitney goes on a date with a trainer.

programme.title: The Hills: Once a Player / Finale
programme.desc: Couples have a habit of making up and breaking up on The Hills, but Lauren still finds herself in relationship limbo with Brody! (S3, ep17)

programme.title: The Hills: Paris Changes Everything
programme.desc: Lauren and Whitney arrive in Paris, where they are about to cover the "Crillon Ball" for Teen Vogue magazine. Heidi visits her mum in snowy Colorado. (S3, ep19)

programme.title: The City: Hit It And Quit It
programme.desc: Whitney grows cautious about Freddie just as her ex, Jay, comes back into the picture. Roxy clashes with Olivia when People's Revolution and Elle join forces to put on a party. (S1, ep18)

programme.title: The City: Weekend at Freddie's
programme.desc: On a weekend trip to the Hamptons, Whitney finds out some surprising news about Freddie. Erin has to pick up the slack when Olivia drops the ball on a big interview assignment. (S1, ep19)

programme.title: The City: Friends And Foe-Workers
programme.desc: When Whitney fights with Roxy at Miami Fashion Week, Kelly questions if they should work together. Erin expects Joe to come down hard on Olivia, but things don't go as she hoped. (S1, ep20)

programme.title: The City: Forget About Boys
programme.desc: Whitney and Roxy go on a series of dates ending in a blow-up at a club. When Olivia gets preferential treatment on a photoshoot, Erin reveals the real reasons she dislikes Olivia. (S1, ep21)

programme.title: The City: If You Want Something Done Right...
programme.desc: Whitney lets Roxy work on a big project, even though Kelly thinks Roxy can't be trusted. When Olivia comes up short for a new assignment, she and Erin have a huge fight. (s1, ep22)

programme.title: The City: Everything on The Line
programme.desc: A sales presentation with Bergdorf Goodman doesn't go as Whitney hoped, but it leads to an even bigger opportunity. Erin & Olivia work together to put Joe Zee on the Today Show. (S1, ep23)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 3 Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts a look back at the hilarious highs and the difficult lows never before seen with Kailyn, Leah, Jenelle and Chelsea from the third season of Teen Mom 2.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 3 Finale Special: Check Up with Dr. Drew Part 1
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts the Teen Moms in front of a live audience. Jenelle sits down with Jace's dad for the first time in years and Chelsea continues to hold on to Adam despite her father's frustrations.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 3 Finale Special: Check Up with Dr. Drew Part 2
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts the Teen Moms in front of a live studio audience. Leah reveals some tragic news about her pregnancy and Kailyn struggles to accept Jo's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Looking for Love
programme.desc: Teen mum Farrah starts dating against her family's wishes while Maci begins planning her wedding. Catelynn moves back home with her parents and Amber's anxiety gets the best of her.

programme.title: Teen Mom: How Many Chances?
programme.desc: Maci contemplates breaking up with her fiancé, while Farrah starts dating a new guy despite her family's disapproval. Meanwhile, Amber and Catelynn both face personal issues.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Fallout
programme.desc: Catelynn's family clashes over her choices while Amber and her fiancé come to blows. Farrah learns that dating isn't easy, and Maci struggles to balance motherhood and school.

programme.title: WWII Air Crash Detectives
programme.desc: A Liberator bomber from RAF Transport Command takes off from Gibraltar for England. On board is General Władysław Sikorski, Prime Minister of Poland's London-based government in exile and Commander-in-Chief of its armed forces.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Armageddon 1943-1945
programme.desc: Armageddon 1943-1945: The defeat at Stalingrad in 1943 was the turning point of the war and convinced the Nazi leadership to intensify their terror and propaganda campaigns.

programme.title: WWII Air Crash Detectives
programme.desc: For the men about to board "Miss Every Morning Fixin", the pressures of the War had been eased by a period of rest and relaxation in Queensland, but they were returning to war operations in Port Moresby, Papua New Guinea. They were never to return.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Genocide 1942-1944
programme.desc: Genocide 1942 - 1944: Along with Treblinka and Majdanek, Sobibor was one of the camps used in Operation Reinhard, in which the Nazis murdered almost two million people.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: The Reckoning 1945-1948
programme.desc: The Reckoning 1945-1948: In 1945, WWII was over but the violence had not ended. The survivors want to blame the Germans. The reckoning with National Socialism is ambivalent.

programme.title: Apocalypse D-Day
programme.desc: Spring 1944: The Allies aim to end Hitler's domination of Western Europe. In the south of England, troops are being trained in the greatest secrecy for a gigantic amphibious operation.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Wicked Return
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, set out for Jeffrey's Ledge in hopes of catching the first fish of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Checkmate
programme.desc: It's week two of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and the Gloucester captains and their crews, from rookies to old pros, get put to the test.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Into The Storm
programme.desc: Bad weather threatens to end the fishing week for the Gloucester fishermen, but while some boats head for home, others decide to take on Mother Nature's wrath.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Operation T.U.N.A
programme.desc: As the hunt for blue fin tuna intensifies, the fisherman resort to espionage for information.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bite Fight
programme.desc: It's the fifth week of the season and the entire fleet battle for the most successful fishing spots.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mission: Fishin!
programme.desc: As Gloucester's Bluefin tuna fleet charges into the heart of the fishing season, it's a tight race for the coveted title of top-earning boat.

programme.title: Wardens: Buggy-ing Out
programme.desc: The Fourth of July weekend in Silver Lake State Park is a non-stop party. It's always a thrill ride as Michigan Conservation Officers help patrol the park during this busy time and make keeping the peace their number one priority.

programme.title: Wardens: Counting Shells
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers spend a lot of time enforcing the laws of waterfowl hunting. Using canoes, they work silently across the state's largest game area. It's not all work as one officer oversees a class trip to the pheasant field.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Opening Day looking for antlers is like a Christmas morning for shed hunters.A few are willing to break the law for a crack at a monster shed.Montana Wardens are on the look out for one offender who is no stranger to a run-in with the law.

programme.title: Wardens: Interstate Travel
programme.desc: To slow the spread of CWD, Michigan Conservation Officers work Opening Day to make sure no deer come in from infected states.Their goal is to stop any deer that don't belong.Suspect deer are checked at the Wildlife Disease Lab.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Montana - Wardens use everything from a deer decoy to a K-9 to make sure hunters are following the rules.

programme.title: Wardens: Deer Patrol Bros
programme.desc: During the opening week, COs and brothers Bill and Shane Webster patrol the state using vastly different strategies. Bill is on aerial patrol looking for illegal bait piles while Shane is working the web to track down offenders.

programme.title: Wardens: Rural Road Huntin'
programme.desc: The opening week of firearm deer season is one the year's busiest. Officers in Districts 3 and 6 tackle road hunting issues in rural Michigan.

programme.title: Wardens: Still on the List
programme.desc: Officers in both the lower and upper peninsula of Michigan work to stop hunters from baiting for bear too early.

programme.title: Wardens: Firearm Opener
programme.desc: All across Michigan, officers spend the 16 days of the firearm deer season responding to all manner of calls. From trespassing to poaching, just when you think you've seen it all, something new pops up.

programme.title: Wardens: Watch Out for Grizzly
programme.desc: Hunters have their downed elk attacked by a grizzly bear and Warden Koeppen investigates a separate dead elk, left in a field.

programme.title: Wardens: Elk Fever
programme.desc: There are two distinct elk seasons in Michigan, one in August and one in December. Patrolling those two seasons couldn't be more different for the Officers in District 3.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: UFO Odyssey
programme.desc: This episode includes: UFO Odyssey, Reporter's Trucker and Haunted Mansion.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Kecksburg UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kecksburg UFO (Pts. 1 & 2), Update: Pizza Man & 3rd Anniversary Reunion, Unknown Arsonist & UD and Hospital Babynap.

programme.title: Alien Contact: UFO Invaders
programme.desc: Hundreds of UFOs have crashed on Earth. Mankind has witnessed these crashes, communicated with the visitors, even left our planet with them once they are able to return to their worlds, but the most shocking revelation is the reason why they come.

programme.title: Aliens Against Nuclear War: Edgar Mitchell
programme.desc: 12 moonwalkers claim ET visited Earth, govt covered it up. Aliens stopped nuclear war. Crazy or worth hearing more?

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: A hospital visit thaws tensions between Aaron and Talia. Holly goes shopping for bridesmaid dresses and Casey hatches a plan behind Marnie's back. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron meets Talia to try and save their relationship. Holly goes on the hunt for her wedding dress and Casey is nearly ready to pop the question... there's just one thing missing. (S3, ep4)

programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. M.A.D. is suspected of stealing the Blarney Stone and is holding it for ransom. With the luck of a four leaf clover and Penny, Inspector Gadget recovers the Stone.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Gadget In Mini-Madness
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Dr. Claw plots with Dr. Shieskopf to eliminate Gadget with his latest invention, the Linguinis, which are five little men with teeth sharp enough to chew up any material object.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Incredible Shrinking Gadget

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Wambini Predicts
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Chief Quimby warns Inspector Gadget of a MAD plot to steal the famous King of Alpacastan's llama that spits diamonds.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Weather In Tibet
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. M.A.D. has invented a weather machine that controls the weather and is demanding money from cities. Inspector Gadget has to find and destroy the machine.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Busy Signal
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Claw realizing Gadget isn't dead sends ghosts to kill him. Gadget tries to arrest the ghosts. Agents #1 and #2 are dressed as Ghost Catchers shooting rancid grease all over the mansion.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Clear Case
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget investigates mysterious ghosts in South America that are scaring off the miners. As usual it is the work of Dr. Claw.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Emerald Duck
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. The famous Emerald Duck is stolen from the temple of the Sungod. Inspector Gadget exposed the criminal and restores order.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: N.S.F. Gadget

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Hackney
programme.desc: This week we're guiding two first time buyers through the property jungle that is East London. Rosie Evatt and Laura Coveney have been friends since childhood and are pooling their resources to buy their first property together.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Kent and Sussex

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Warwickshire
programme.desc: It's like Doctor Dolittle meets Lawrence of Arabia as Kirstie and Phil help the camel-racing Fossett clan relocate their ever-expanding menagerie of children and wild beasts.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Welsh Borders
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are dealing with a full-blown mid-life crisis in the Welsh Borders! Management trainer Mel has set them the challenge of finding a hillside home to house his very own leadership and team building centre

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Sheffield
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are house hunting in Sheffield. Fire fighter Justin and his sales manager wife Deborah have got £250k burning a hole in their back pocket and they're desperate to find the perfect do-up property to settle down in.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Exeter
programme.desc: The presenters search for properties near Exeter. Kirstie Allsopp helps a couple spend their £600,000 budget on a rural home with plenty of space and an annexe for wife Nancy's mother.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Cheltenham And Gloucestershire
programme.desc: Cosmopolitan couple Mel and Jon have lived in cities all over the world and now want to settle into rural life in the Cotswolds.

programme.title: Arthur: The Great MacGrady, Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: When Mrs. MacGrady is diagnosed with cancer, Arthur and his friends all react differently to the news. The kids must learn how to come together to help support each other and Mrs. MacGrady.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Rides The Bandwagon/Dad's Dessert Dilemma
programme.desc: Woogles have their own names and personalities and they're so darned cute! And Arthur's gotta have one, especially now that everyone is collecting them. Arthur wouldn't mind if Dad's infamous dessert "experiments" remained a family secret.

programme.title: Arthur: Mr. Ratburn's Secret Identity/Besties
programme.desc: Mysterious calls. Superhuman strength. Is Mr. Ratburn secretly a superhero? When Buster and Ladonna bond over a memorable trip to the movies, Arthur feels left out. Has Ladonna taken his place as Buster's best bud?

programme.title: Arthur: Postcards from Buster, Parts I & II
programme.desc: Buster's going to New York City to meet his dad Bo, and the Reads are coming with him! He's thrilled ... but won't his mom miss him? But, Bitzi gives him a present that will let him share his exciting trip with her--a video camera!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. All Wet/Buster's Dino Dilemma
programme.desc: The Reads are having a wonderful time at the beach, except for D.W. who simply refuses to have fun. Next, Buster and Arthur make a long-awaited field trip to a dinosaur excavation.

programme.title: Arthur: Brain's Brain/Brain Sees Stars
programme.desc: Brain's Easter egg hunts are notoriously hard. But this year's might prove impossible if Brain can't remember where he hid the final egg. Then, crazy coincidences have prevented Brain from seeing a meteor shower in person.

programme.title: Arthur: The Contest/Prove It
programme.desc: What would happen if Arthur and his friends entered a contest to write stories for their favorite TV show? Then, look out world, D.W. has discovered science! But D.W.'s new-found passion proves that a little knowledge is a dangerous thing.

programme.title: Arthur: Swept Away/Germophobia
programme.desc: Arthur, D.W. and Buster are spending a few days at the beach. Can they save their sandcastle from the ocean tides? Buster's friends have had enough of his sloppy habits, so they band together to educate him on the realities of bacteria.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Tooth/D.W. Gets Lost
programme.desc: It's bad enough to wear glasses all the time. But does Arthur have to be the last person in his class to lose his baby teeth? Then, if you think being lost in a humongous department store would scare a four-year-old, think again.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: At Home in the Park
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Make Music
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ have fun learning about music, rhythm and musical instruments. Barney introduces many different instruments and BJ dreams of one day becoming a rock 'n roll star. They discover that music gives everyone a happy feelin.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff has many special qualities, but sometimes, his shyness makes it hard for him to meet new friends. It’s a special day in the park as Barney and the little dinosaurs enjoy an Art Festival.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Ahora Mismo!
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Three Lines, Three Corners
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A World of Friends
programme.desc: The children learn about many different countries while experiencing an "International Fair" on the playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When several sports balls suddenly disappear without a trace, it’s detective BJ to the rescue as he dons trenchcoat and fedora.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Red, Yellow and Blue!
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff can’t find his drumsticks anywhere. Barney helps Baby Bop explore many different jobs.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ship
programme.desc: After the "Atlantis" ship disappeared, Optimus Prime and Megatron head to the moon where it's hiding while Vector Prime and the kids locate the Omega Lock.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Hero
programme.desc: Optimus discovers that Hot Shot has disobeyed his orders while Red Alert has covered for him. However, he is forced to put his trust into Hot Shot to win the Cyber Key from Override.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Race
programme.desc: Hot Shot and the Autobots battle Ransack and Crumplezone in the first round, while Starscream continues to build his forces when he recruits Mudflap and Lori and Bud uncover information on the Ancients' prehistoric visit to Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Detour
programme.desc: As the race for the Speed Planet Cup continues, Hot Shot teaches Override the Autobots' code of honor, while Overhaul faces Scourge on the Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Savage
programme.desc: Koby helps Hot Shot to train for the grueling next leg of the Speed Planet Cup, while Optimus Prime and Vector Prime answer a distress call from the Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Sand
programme.desc: Hot Shot takes a dangerous gamble in the next round of the Speed Planet Cup, while Sideways tries to pit the Autobots against the Decepticons against each other...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Champion
programme.desc: After the terrible injuries sustained in the last race, Hot Shot cannot finish the final race on his own... Leaving Coby to enter the tournament as Hot Shot's driver.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ice
programme.desc: Bud, Lori and Coby encounter government scientist Professor Suzuki while investigating strange phenomena at the North Pole, while Starscream plans a new attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Honor
programme.desc: Leobreaker disobeys Optimus' direct orders and attacks Scourge. Although Scourge now respects Leobreaker, the incident has caused a rift between him and Optimus...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Primal
programme.desc: Scourge and Optimus Prime battle each other for the Jungle Planet Cyber Key with Override from Speed Planet and Lori from earth being the guest viewers.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Trust
programme.desc: In an attempt to confuse the Decepticons, Optimus makes duplicate cyber keys for each Autobot. Meanwhile Dr. Suzuki makes an amazing discovery at the North Pole.

programme.title: Property Brothers: April
programme.desc: Working long hours and eager to upgrade her starter home, April is looking to buy a house in the downtown core. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help her find a budget-friendly dream home to be renovated.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kristine & Paul
programme.desc: Stuck in a tiny apartment with their rambunctious young son, Evan, Kristine and Paul are desperate to buy a spacious home. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help the couple find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sarah & Mari
programme.desc: Crammed in close quarters with her sister's family, Sarah and partner Mari desperately need their own house to raise their baby daughter. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help them find a budget-friendly home

programme.title: Property Brothers: Samira & Shawn
programme.desc: Busy professionals Samira and Shawn are living out of a suitcase as they hunt for the perfect house-ideally a luxury pad close to Shawn's office. The Property Brothers help them find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Angie & Tito
programme.desc: Angie and Tito live in a cramped apartment full of their kid's toys. They want a large, modern house they can grow into, close to downtown, with a gourmet kitchen and lots of closets. The Property Brothers come to help.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles of the Jungle
programme.desc: Donatello's idol, inventor mad-scientist Professor Willard creates the Molecular Intensifier, a machine to control growth of living things.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Toys Around
programme.desc: Michelangelo dreams he's being attacked by Tyranno-toys. He wakes up to hear April announcing the Toy Fair opening. Determined to go, Michelangelo disguises himself as a Turtle toy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Peking Turtles
programme.desc: April O'Neil reports from the Uptown Museum about a display of artifacts from the 2000-year-old Ying Dynasty of China. The marble warriors were built to protect the world's largest pearl from being stolen from the Emperor's collection of jewels.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's Mother
programme.desc: The earth is experiencing global warming and Krang and Shredder threaten to expose it to increased catastrophic weather conditions.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Four Turtles and A Baby

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtlemaniac

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rondo in New York
programme.desc: Word spreads that Oswald Oren, a nerdy Woody Allen-type student, has developed the Vitalizer - an experimental substance that brings inanimate objects to life. Scoundrels Shredder, Krang, Bebop and Rocksteady connive to steal the potion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtles
programme.desc: A commercial for the Personal Energy Projector (PEP), allowing the transfer of energy from one source to another, entices Krang. Targeting Earth, he drains the sphere's energy to strengthen the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Name That Toon
programme.desc: Krang threatens to vapourize the city by manipulating a Dematerializer, but a musical instrument that Howie, Irma's friend, plays around with, interferes with the device's programming.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Menace Maestro, Please
programme.desc: An invitation from April leads the Turtles, Irma and friend Howie to the haunted but renovated Floxy Music Hall, where the legendary Phantom of the Floxy resides.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is put out when he loses several games of hide-and-seek. Pingu refuses to help Mother. Pingu asks Father if they can go up the mountain. Pingu goes fishing but promises to be back on time.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu decides that he is too old for toys. Pingu helps his father wipe fresh snow off the car. Pingu has a day off school.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu's friend plays with a kite outside the house. Pingu discovers a magnet. Pingu plays with his boat on the water. Pingu plays with his toys when he falls asleep.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu wants to play a thoughtless trick on Grandfather. Pingu and his sister play with their aeroplane. Pingu constantly plays tricks on his sister. Pingu sees a magic kit in the shop.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu wants to bake a cake by himself. The arm falls off Pingu's sister's teddy bear. The Pingu family receives a call from Grandfather asking for their help.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is delighted when he receives a Valentine card. Pingu tries to sleep, but his sister is snoring. Pingu bounces on everything in the igloo. The siblings argue over their toys.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: It is a very windy day. Seeing a seagull in flight makes Pingu want to fly. Father uses a shovel to clear snow from his snowcart.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu goes snowboarding with Robby. Pingu's grandfather tells him all about the moon. Pingu and his sister put up a tent.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Father takes Pingu out on a fishing expedition. Everyone enters the local Ice Sculpture Contest. Pingu's sister wants to play with her new balloon. Grandfather inspires Pingu to make real music.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Mother's knitting machine fascinates Pingu. It is bedtime, but Pingu and his sister are still playing. Pingu plays a game of tag with his sister.

programme.title: Pingu
